name: sf-local-architect
description: One-click install and setup of the Local Salesforce Architect MCP engine for GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and Claude Code. Fully local, offline Salesforce architecture tooling.

commands.title: Local SF Architect: Run Setup (Install + Configure)
Local SF Architect: Install / Update Engine
Local SF Architect: Download Model + Seed Knowledge Base
Local SF Architect: Configure GitHub Copilot / VS Code
Local SF Architect: Configure Claude Code
Local SF Architect: Configure All Detected Agents
Local SF Architect: Rebuild Local Stores

sfArchitect.enginePackage.markdownDescription: PyPI package name (or `name==version` / local path) used to install the engine via `uv tool install`.

sfArchitect.autoSetupOnActivate.description: On first activation, automatically run the install + configure flow (with a confirmation prompt). Disable to run setup manually via the command palette.

sfArchitect.autoConfigureAgents.description: Automatically wire the engine into detected agents (Copilot/VS Code, Cursor, Claude Code) without an extra prompt per agent.

sfArchitect.autoDownloadModel.description: During first-run setup, automatically download the embedding and reranker models (~210 MB total). If disabled, you must run the model download manually before querying patterns.

sfArchitect.uvPath.description: Absolute path to the `uv` executable. Leave empty to auto-detect on PATH and in common install locations.

walkthroughs.title: Get started with Local SF Architect
walkthroughs.description: Install the local engine and wire it into Copilot, Cursor, or Claude Code.

steps.title: Install the engine
steps.description:
Install the fully-local Salesforce architect engine from PyPI using uv.
[Install / Update Engine](command:sfArchitect.installEngine)

steps.title: Download model + seed
steps.description:
Download the embedding + reranker models (~210 MB, once) and build the local knowledge base.
[Download Model + Seed](command:sfArchitect.firstRunSetup)

steps.title: Configure your agents
steps.description:
Wire the engine into every detected agent.
[Configure All Detected Agents](command:sfArchitect.configureAll)
